title: Spanish Chicken Croquetas
description: Crispy fried balls filled with shredded chicken in a creamy Spanish-inspired sauce. Perfect as a snack or appetizer.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the shredded chicken, intensely creamy sauce, and Spanish croquetas mix.
In a separate bowl, beat the eggs.
Add the flour and mix until a dough forms.
Add the bread crumbs and mix until combined.
Using your hands, shape the dough into small balls, about 1 1/2 inches in diameter.
Dip each ball into the beaten eggs, then roll in the flour mixture to coat.
Heat the vegetable oil in a deep frying pan over medium-high heat.
When the oil is hot, add a few of the coated balls to the pan and fry until golden brown, about 2-3 minutes.
Remove the croquetas from the oil and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
